name: Black Beans with Fresh Plums and Bell Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill a deep saucepan with water and bring to a boil.
2. Add plums and boil for 30 seconds to loosen skin.
3. Remove with a slotted spoon and set aside to cool.
4. Melt butter or heat oil in a large skillet. Add onion, red and yellow bell peppers, garlic, cloves, cumin, and cilantro. Saute gently, stirring often, until onion softens, about 5 to 10 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, peel plums, remove pits, and chop pulp. Add pulp, lemon juice, and honey to the onion mixture. Add beans, cover, and continue cooking over low heat until peppers are soft, about 30 minutes, stirring often to prevent sticking.
6. Makes 3 to 4 servings.
Per serving: 299 calories; 10 grams protein; 7 grams fat; 48 grams carbohydrate; 12 milligrams sodium; 9 grams fiber. Lacto/Vegan Vegetarian Times, August 1993/MM by DEEANNE
